hero.headline: Cited answers from your own study materials
hero.subheadline: Upload your notes, textbooks, and slides — ask questions, generate quizzes and flashcards, and get answers cited back to the exact source.

how.title: How it works
how.step1Body: Add your notes, textbooks, or slides — StudyMate parses and organizes them per subject.
how.step2Body: Ask a question, or generate a quiz or flashcards from what you've uploaded.
how.step3Body: Every answer cites the exact document and passage it came from — no guessing.

features.title: Everything you need to study smarter
features.citedBody: Every answer names the exact document and passage it's grounded in.
features.flashcardsBody: Turn any subject's material into spaced-repetition flashcards in seconds.
features.quizzesBody: Generate multiple-choice quizzes from your own material to test yourself.
features.organizationBody: Keep every course or subject's material, chats, and progress in one place.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.freeDescription: Everything you need to get started.

closing.title: Ready to study smarter?
closing.body: Start free — no credit card required.

Support.heading: Help & FAQ
Support.subheading: Answers to common questions about using StudyMate.

questions.howToStart: How do I start studying with my own materials?
questions.fileTypes: What file types can I upload, and how large can they be?
questions.unansweredQuestions: What happens if I ask something my materials don't cover?
questions.howFlashcardsWork: How do flashcards and spaced repetition work?
questions.whatIsProgress: What does the Progress page show?
questions.howToUpgrade: How do I upgrade my plan?
questions.whatHappensAtLimit: What happens if I hit a plan limit?

answers.whatIsStudyMate: StudyMate turns the materials you upload into an organized study workspace: cited Q&A over your own documents, auto-generated quizzes and flashcards, and progress tracking, all organized by subject.
answers.howToStart: Create a subject, then upload a document to it. StudyMate parses the file, generates an auto-summary, and makes it searchable for Ask, quizzes, and flashcards within a few seconds to a couple of minutes depending on file size.
answers.fileTypes: PDF, DOCX (Word), and TXT files, up to 20 MB each.
answers.howAskWorks: Ask a question about a subject's uploaded materials and StudyMate retrieves the most relevant passages, then answers using only that material, with citations pointing back to the source file and passage so you can verify every answer.
answers.unansweredQuestions: StudyMate answers only from what you've uploaded. If nothing relevant is found, it says so plainly instead of guessing or answering from outside knowledge.
answers.howQuizWorks: Quizzes are generated from a subject's uploaded materials, with structured questions you can answer and check yourself against.
answers.howFlashcardsWork: Flashcards are generated from your materials and reviewed using the SM-2 spaced-repetition algorithm: cards you find harder resurface sooner, cards you know well are shown less often.
answers.whatIsProgress: A read-only view of your study activity per subject and overall, documents processed, quiz and flashcard activity, so you can see how your studying adds up over time.
answers.whatPlansExist: Free, Pro ($20/month), and Business ($100/month). Free includes up to 3 subjects, 10 documents per subject, and 20 quiz/flashcard generations per day. Pro raises that to 50 subjects, 200 documents per subject, and 200 generations per day. Business is unlimited on all three.
answers.howToUpgrade: Open Plan & billing from the sidebar and choose a plan. You'll be redirected to a secure checkout page to complete the upgrade.
answers.whatHappensAtLimit: StudyMate tells you which limit you've reached and offers to upgrade. You won't lose any existing data; you just can't create more of that item (or run more generations) until you upgrade or the daily limit resets.

Referral.heading: Refer a friend
Referral.description: Share your link with classmates. When someone signs up through it, the referral is tracked automatically.
Referral.copyError: Couldn't copy the link. Please copy it manually.
Referral.referredCount: {count, plural, =0 {No one referred yet} one {# person referred} other {# people referred}}
Referral.bonusEarned: You've earned {count, plural, one {+# generation} other {+# generations}} per day
Referral.redeemedToast: Thanks for joining through a friend's link!

Team.description: Manage your organization, members, and roles.
Team.noOrgDescription: Create an organization to study together — invite members and share subjects with your team.

Assignments.heading: Assignments
Assignments.teacherDescription: Assign material to your organization and see who's completed it.
Assignments.studentDescription: Assignments from your organization, with a way to mark each one complete.
Assignments.noOrgDescription: Join or create an organization to see and assign work to your team.
